control_center.tooltip.ready:
OBS is ready
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click toggles recording
Middle click toggles the replay buffer
control_center.tooltip.needs_restart:
OBS is running, but WebSocket control is unavailable
Restart OBS once to restore controls
panel.header.title: OBS Control
panel.header.active: Active outputs: {outputs}. Manage capture, replay, or streaming from here.
panel.header.ready: OBS is connected and ready for recording, replay, or streaming.
panel.header.needs_restart: OBS is open, but WebSocket control is unavailable until it is restarted once.
panel.header.offline: OBS is offline. Launch it here and the widget will track its state.
panel.status.label: Status
panel.status.connected_hint: Left click {primaryAction}. Right click toggles recording, middle click toggles replay, and the panel exposes streaming and save actions.
panel.status.disconnected_hint: WebSocket control is unavailable right now. Launch or restart OBS to restore quick actions.
panel.status.managed_hint: Plugin-managed launches can close OBS after the last active recording, replay, or stream stops.
settings.header.label: OBS Control
settings.header.description: Control how often the plugin polls OBS, how it launches OBS, and when recording, replay, or streaming state appears in the shell.
settings.poll_interval.label: Poll Interval
settings.poll_interval.description: How often the plugin refreshes OBS state, in milliseconds.
settings.left_click_action.label: Left Click Action
settings.left_click_action.description: Choose whether left click opens the panel or toggles recording or streaming directly.
settings.launch_behavior.label: Launch Behavior
settings.launch_behavior.description: Choose how the explicit Launch OBS action opens OBS. Automatic recording, replay, or streaming starts still launch minimized to the tray.
settings.bar_label_mode.label: Bar Label Mode
settings.bar_label_mode.description: Choose how the bar indicator renders active OBS outputs.
settings.videos_path.label: Videos Path
settings.videos_path.description: Optional custom folder used by the panel and the toast action. Leave empty to use your default Videos directory.
settings.videos_opener.label: Videos Opener
settings.videos_opener.description: Command used to open the Videos folder. Set this to your GUI file manager if xdg-open resolves to a terminal opener.
settings.auto_close_managed.label: Auto-Close Managed OBS
settings.auto_close_managed.description: If the plugin had to cold-launch OBS for recording, replay, or streaming, close OBS again after the last active output stops.
settings.open_videos_after_stop.label: Show Open Videos After Stop
settings.open_videos_after_stop.descript: Offer an Open Videos toast action after recording stops or a replay is saved.
settings.show_elapsed_in_bar.label: Show Elapsed In Bar
settings.show_elapsed_in_bar.description: Allow duration labels in the bar when Bar Label Mode is set to Duration Labels.
settings.show_bar_recording.label: Show Bar While Recording
settings.show_bar_recording.description: Display the bar indicator while OBS is actively recording.
settings.show_bar_replay.label: Show Bar While Replay Is Active
settings.show_bar_replay.description: Keep the bar indicator visible when only the replay buffer is running.
settings.show_bar_streaming.label: Show Bar While Streaming
settings.show_bar_streaming.description: Keep the bar indicator visible when OBS is actively streaming.
settings.show_control_center_recording.d: Show the Control Center shortcut while OBS is recording.
settings.show_control_center_replay.labe: Show Control Center While Replay Is Active
settings.show_control_center_replay.desc: Show the Control Center shortcut while the replay buffer is active.
settings.show_control_center_streaming.d: Show the Control Center shortcut while OBS is streaming.
settings.show_control_center_ready.label: Show Control Center When OBS Is Ready
settings.show_control_center_ready.descr: Keep the shortcut visible when OBS is connected but idle.
toast.record_started.title: OBS recording started
toast.record_started_launch.title: OBS recording started
toast.record_stopped.title: OBS recording stopped
toast.record_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS recording stopped
toast.record_stopped_autoclose.body: Recording saved to Videos. OBS closed.
toast.stream_started.title: OBS stream started
toast.stream_started_launch.title: OBS stream started
toast.stream_stopped.title: OBS stream stopped
toast.stream_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS stream stopped
toast.replay_started.title: OBS replay buffer started
toast.replay_started_launch.title: OBS replay buffer started
toast.replay_stopped.title: OBS replay buffer stopped
toast.replay_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS replay buffer stopped
toast.replay_stopped_autoclose.body: Instant replay is off. OBS closed.
toast.replay_saved.title: OBS replay saved
toast.replay_saved.body: Saved the last replay buffer to Videos.
toast.offline.title: OBS is offline
toast.offline.body: Launch OBS to use recording controls.
toast.error.title: OBS control failed
